description.en: Attacks an enemy.\nBefore attacking, if the caster's current Health is <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> or lower, restores <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> of <color=#28d9ed>self</color>'s Max Health.\nIf the caster's current Health exceeds <color=#28d9ed>85%</color>, heals the ally with the lowest Health by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> of Nella's Max Health.
description.kr:
적을 공격합니다.

공격 전 자신의 현재 체력이 <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> 이하라면 <color=#28d9ed>자신</color> 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>를 회복합니다.

공격 전 자신의 현재 체력이 <color=#28d9ed>85%</color>를 초과한다면 체력 상황이 가장 나쁜 아군의 체력을 넬라 최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>만큼 회복시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。\n攻撃前、自分の現在HPが<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>以下の場合、<color=#28d9ed>自分</color>の最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>を回復する。\n攻撃前、自分の現在HPが<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>を超える場合、最もHPが低い味方のHPをネラの最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>分回復する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人。\n攻击前,若自身当前生命值≤<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>,则回复<color=#28d9ed>自身</color>最大生命值的<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。\n攻击前,若自身当前生命值><color=#28d9ed>85%</color>,则为生命值最低的友军回复内拉最大生命值<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>的生命。

description.en: (Triggered Effect) Triggers <color=#28d9ed>Rapid Response</color> upon being hit.\nIncreases the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> and heals all allies by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> of Nella's Max Health.
description.kr: (발동 효과) 피격 시 <color=#28d9ed>신속 대응</color> 효과가 발동합니다.\n자신의 행동 게이지가 <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> 증가하며, 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>을 넬라 최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>만큼 회복시킵니다.
description.jp: (発動効果)被弾時に<color=#28d9ed>迅速対応</color>が発動する。\n自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>UPし、味方全体のHPをネラの最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>分回復する。
description.zh: (触发效果)受到攻击时触发<color=#28d9ed>迅速应对</color>。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>,并为全体友军回复内拉最大生命值<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>的生命。

description.en: Increases the <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of surviving allies by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, then <color=#28d9ed>Resurrects (Greater)</color> all fallen allies. Afterwards, heals all allies by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> of Nella's Max Health and grants <color=#28d9ed>Immunity</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2</color> turn(s).\nAdditionally grants all allies except the caster <color=#28d9ed>Attack Up</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Penetration Up</color> for <color=#28d9ed>3 turns</color>.
description.kr: 생존한 아군의 행동 게이지를 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 증가시킨 후, 사망한 아군 전체를 <color=#28d9ed>부활(강화)</color>시킵니다. 이후 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>을 넬라 최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>만큼 회복시키고, <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 면역을 부여합니다.\n\n자신을 제외한 아군에게 추가적으로 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>공격력, 관통력</color> 증가 효과를 부여합니다.
description.jp: 生存している味方の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>UPした後、戦闘不能の味方全員を<color=#28d9ed>復活(強化)</color>させる。さらに味方全体のHPをネラの最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>分回復し、<color=#28d9ed>2</color>ターンのあいだ<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>を付与する。\n加えて自分以外の味方に<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力UP</color>と<color=#28d9ed>貫通力UP</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>付与する。
description.zh: 使存活友军的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,随后使全体阵亡友军<color=#28d9ed>复活(强化)</color>。之后为全体友军回复内拉最大生命值<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>的生命,并赋予<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>,持续<color=#28d9ed>2</color>回合。\n另外,为除自身外的友军赋予<color=#28d9ed>攻击力提升</color>与<color=#28d9ed>穿透力提升</color>持续<color=#28d9ed>3</color>回合。

name.jp: パンデモニウムの指導者

description.en: At the start of the turn, if all allies except the caster are <color=#28d9ed>dead</color>, resets the skill cooldown of <color=#28d9ed>Coronation</color>.
description.kr: 턴 시작 시 자신을 제외한 모든 아군이 <color=#28d9ed>사망</color>했다면 <color=#28d9ed>대관식</color>의 스킬 쿨타임이 초기화됩니다.
description.jp: ターン開始時、自分を除く味方全体が<color=#28d9ed>倒れた</color>場合、<color=#28d9ed>【即位の儀】</color>のスキルターンが初期化される。
description.zh: 回合开始时,如果除自身以外的所有友军均<color=#28d9ed>已阵亡</color>,则重置<color=#28d9ed>加冕礼</color>的技能冷却时间。

description.en: Becomes <color=#28d9ed>Enraged</color> every 5 turns.\n\n<color=#28d9ed>Enraged Ultimate Skill</color>: Removes all debuffs from self and deals massive damage to all enemies, then grants <color=#28d9ed>Immunity</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.
description.kr: 5턴 마다 <color=#28d9ed>광폭화</color> 상태로 전환합니다.\n\n<color=#28d9ed>광폭화 돌입과 필살기</color> : 자신의 약화 효과를 모두 해제하고 적 전체에게 치명적인 피해를 입힙니다. 이 후, 자신에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>면역</color>을 부여합니다.
description.jp: 5ターンごとに<color=#28d9ed>【狂暴化】</color>状態に切り替わる。\n\n<color=#28d9ed>【狂暴化】</color>:自分の弱体効果をすべて解除し、敵全体に大ダメージを与え、その後、自分に<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>を付与する。
description.zh: 每5回合转换为<color=#28d9ed>狂暴化</color>状态。\n\n<color=#28d9ed>陷入狂暴化和必杀技</color>:解除自身所有弱化效果,对全体敌人造成巨大伤害,并为自身赋予<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color><color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>效果。
